{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Indirial's eyes
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial's eyes]] are black with floating circles of burning violet.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
